{{CargoOrgan
|name=Body Claw
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10665
|idx=22
|description=Hidden in the abdomen - a retractable third claw designed for one purpose only: delivering the perfect killing blow with surgical precision.
|skill=Summon Skull Claw, dealing DMG equal to 150.4% of ATK, and increase next round's CRIT DMG by 26%!
|hp=2554
|def=126
|atk=130
|rush=120
|gene1=In Mecha Form, Earth DMG +120
|gene2=In Mecha Form, {race} HP +400
|gene3=In Mecha Form, {race} DEF +40
|gene4=In Mecha Form, DMG REDUC +2%
|gene7=In Mecha Form, DMG REDUC +2% (Awakened)
|}}
